title: tagetes campanulata
intro: Tagetes campanulata, also known as the Butterfly Marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Tagetes campanulata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as acting as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of Tagetes campanulata include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in a carrier oil or water.
